## Summary

- Describe the user-visible or developer-facing change.

## Checks

- [ ] JSON parse passed
- [ ] JS syntax check passed
- [ ] `node tests/model.test.js` passed
- [ ] Manual Firefox QA run or explained

## Privacy And Product Boundary

- [ ] No telemetry, analytics, accounts, cloud sync, or remote executable code added
- [ ] Permissions are unchanged or tied to an implemented runtime path
- [ ] Derived prediction/confidence values are not persisted as source truth
- [ ] No third-party logos or trademark-confusing assets added
